// ABOUT

I'm a full-stack developer from Peru who likes owning problems from end to end — requirements, architecture, code, deployment. Most of my work lives in enterprise and public-sector systems: invoicing, inventory, document tracking, access control. I've built systems from scratch where none existed before, and I'm comfortable being the person who figures it out.

My core stack is Python (Django/Flask) and Java (Jakarta EE / Apache Tomcat) on SQL Server and PostgreSQL, with React Native for mobile and PHP where needed. I work autonomously, write clearly, and my time zone (UTC−5) overlaps the entire US workday — so real-time remote collaboration is easy.

// SELECTED WORK

15 systems shipped

FLAGSHIP

POS & SUNAT Invoicing Engine

Freelance · in production

A full point-of-sale with built-in SUNAT-compliant e-invoicing, coded from scratch — no paid third-party providers. It only needs the client's Digital Tax Certificate and issues receipts with no volume limit.

~5,000 e-receipts issued

Python Django REST PostgreSQL

Inventario_MDJLBYR

Municipality · built from scratch

The organization's first asset-inventory platform: registration, current accounts, transfers, valuation and depreciation, with live dashboards over 4,675+ assets.

4,675 assets · reports in seconds

Django SQL Server

Queue Management System

Municipality · citizen service

An end-to-end queue system for the tax office: self-service kiosk, agent window module and a live TV display that calls and tracks turns in real time.

Kiosk · agent · TV display

Python Django

Street-Vendor Authorizations

Municipality · security tooling

A QR-based authorization system for street vendors: registry with photos, yearly renewals and secure QR-credential generation used for on-street verification.

QR credentials · vendor registry

PHP MySQL

Citizen Mobile App

A React Native app for the district's citizens — including the BustaCard digital credential and municipal services on the phone.

React Native
